visa_types.name: Study/ Internship
visa_types.documents_required:
Please download, print, fill, sign and submit your visa application form. 
Internship (Non-Curricular internship) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/72QVfOiY7OLqTc0hHBu7xA/004ece3c6a64512c0add2129c0dd8268/Internship_Non-curricular-internship_.pdf)
To study in a basic education level (primary, elementary and secondary school) or to study in a shot course (Thai or English language) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6bcuJJwioNoZm4t7fc2CKq/d21a1ef02dfcb0294c2a7c044d51d202/To-study-in-a-basic-education-level-_primary_-elementary-and-secondary-school_-or-To-study-in-a-short-course-_Thai-or-Englis.pdf)
To study in a higher education level (university and college) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3FFivnB07yVgNbQGxN8pIE/3bf4fb16cc3dc8954cca4daa633372ee/To-study-in-a-higher-education-level-_university-and-college_.pdf)

visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:  Study/ Internship ]
The CNY visa fee shall be calculated according to the consular exchange rate. If there is any change, no notice will be given. 
When applying for a Thai visa, the applicant needs to pay a service fee of 57,200 MNT (including tax) in cash. For applying COE through the VAC is with service fee 28,600 MNT (including tax) in cash.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
If the purpose of travelling is Study or Internship you need to apply Study/Internship Visa.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
If the purpose of travelling is Study or Internship you need to apply Study/Internship Visa.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Study/ Internship ]
The CNY visa fee shall be calculated according to the consular exchange rate. If there is any change, no notice will be given. 
When applying for a Thai visa, the applicant needs to pay a service fee of 57,200 MNT (including tax) in cash. For applying COE through the VAC is with service fee 28,600 MNT (including tax) in cash.

## Documents Required
Please download, print, fill, sign and submit your visa application form. 
Internship (Non-Curricular internship) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/72QVfOiY7OLqTc0hHBu7xA/004ece3c6a64512c0add2129c0dd8268/Internship_Non-curricular-internship_.pdf)
To study in a basic education level (primary, elementary and secondary school) or to study in a shot course (Thai or English language) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6bcuJJwioNoZm4t7fc2CKq/d21a1ef02dfcb0294c2a7c044d51d202/To-study-in-a-basic-education-level-_primary_-elementary-and-secondary-school_-or-To-study-in-a-short-course-_Thai-or-Englis.pdf)
To study in a higher education level (university and college) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3FFivnB07yVgNbQGxN8pIE/3bf4fb16cc3dc8954cca4daa633372ee/To-study-in-a-higher-education-level-_university-and-college_.pdf)
Internship (Curricular internship) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7FaukT8HVeh2glazvFXN3W/f5382b88498bec0b92a3075e4ad3e2ff/Internship-_Curricular-internship_.pdf)
Declaration Form (Signature Required) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1gET8vPwnHHRFIhzpfVo0V/0abb8f571892d1eb1a0935f01d202a06/visa-application-statement-jan-2022.pdf)
